scripts.test: bun test tests/utils.test.ts && bun test tests/push.unit.test.ts && bun test tests/pop-status.unit.test.ts && bun test tests/push.test.ts tests/pop-status.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: bun test tests/utils.test.ts && bun test tests/push.unit.test.ts && bun test tests/pop-status.unit.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage tests/utils.test.ts && bun test --coverage tests/push.unit.test.ts && bun test --coverage tests/pop-status.unit.test.ts
